These still sell at 250 â€“ 400p but much less frequently now due an increase in sellers. They move in moderate quantities (10 â€“ 30) every couple of months now. Iâ€™ve never seen buyers for these in barter mode. (/barter in the bazaar zone.)

easy to find in the right places
QuoteReply
# Sep 15 2005 at 12:36 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591833519732
Scholar
19 posts
Tons of people do the DoNs in Lavastorm mountains. I buy stacks of them for my JC.
I find them on the vendors in the good and evil camps and the druid ring. I buy em for around 157 plat on vendors i think.

Just remember if you are looking for something find a vendor near the most popular zones.

dropped in EF ldon
QuoteReply
# Apr 28 2004 at 8:21 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1717373792495
55 posts
saw 1 Jacinth drop in EFrost LDoN a few days ago ... normal setting (not a 'Hard' adventure) ... average group level was probably around 61-62.

the master looter wanted to just sell it to a vendor (eek) ... i insisted all 6 group members roll ... of course i did not win ... c'est la vie

maybe this helps ...

▲ Page top
The prices
QuoteReply
# Apr 16 2004 at 2:33 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1614557793098
View User Forum
16 posts
Been trying to land one all day, maybe got impatient as I am working on my GMA Vial. So I finally went to the bazaar to see if I could just buy one adn the cheapest one was 1200 plat. I thought OMG!! Seeing how I just blew much of my hard earned dough on poisons and pottery the last few days I figured ***** it. If I can get this and the BS tonight I can return to BoT and PoV to land some sellable items to return my savings to health, with my GMA Vial in tow hehe. One prob, I have just a hair over 1k plat now, and not a BS in site. SO I gotta go back tomorrow and camp the mobs that drop it, many of which drop the Jancith too. You know exactly what will happen. No BS, but a Jancith will drop!!!!! ARGH!
▲ Page top
Not storebought.
QuoteReply
# Feb 05 2003 at 7:50 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591779798637
View User Forum
21 posts
just so everyone knows.. I have checked for 2 days in a row in the majority of vendors including the ones listed here and there was no Jacinth to be found in Thurgadin. I believe someone sold Jacinth to a vendor.. then a person went to same vendor and bought it , then posted here that it was storebought. So for all you searching for Jacinth... I believe that it is only NPC drop.thanks
Mcleod
